languages.text: "Когда мир накрыла тьма, и Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, покинула свои небесные чертоги, почти все почтенные кланы отправились со своими семьями на ковчеги, дабы привести к нам помощь из темноты меж звезд".

traits.locale_text: "Когда мир накрыла тьма, и Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, покинула свои небесные чертоги, почти все почтенные кланы отправились со своими семьями на ковчеги, дабы привести к нам помощь из темноты меж звезд".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."
languages.original_text: "Когда мир накрыла тьма, и Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, покинула свои небесные чертоги, почти все почтенные кланы отправились со своими семьями на ковчеги, дабы привести к нам помощь из темноты меж звезд".

traits.locale_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Als die Dunkelheit über unsere Welt hereinbrach und Nolla, die feurige Botin des Kaisers, aus ihrem himmlischen Palast floh, bestiegen fast alle ehrwürdigen Clans Archenschiffe, um Hilfe aus der Leere zwischen den Sternen zu holen."
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."

languages.text: "Lorsque les ténèbres se sont abattues sur notre monde et que Nolla, la Messagère ardente de l'Empereur, a fui son palais céleste, presque tous les clans vénérables sont montés à bord de navires-arches pour apporter de l'aide depuis le vide entre les étoiles.
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."

languages.text: "当黑暗降临到我们的世界时" "皇帝的火焰使者诺拉逃离了她的天宫" "几乎所有尊贵的氏族都登上了方舟船" "从星际之间的虚空中寻求帮助"
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."

languages.text: "Cuando la oscuridad cayó sobre nuestro mundo y Nolla, la Mensajera Ardiente del Emperador, huyó de su palacio celestial, casi todos los clanes venerables embarcaron en naves arca para traer ayuda del vacío entre las estrellas".
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."

languages.text: 「私たちの世界に闇が訪れ、皇帝の炎の使者であるノーラが天空の宮殿から逃げ出したとき、ほとんどすべての由緒ある氏族が箱舟に乗り込み、星と星の間の虚空から助けを運んできた。
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."

languages.text: "Dünyamıza karanlık çöktüğünde ve İmparatorun Ateşli Elçisi Nolla göksel sarayından kaçtığında, neredeyse tüm saygıdeğer klanlar yıldızlar arasındaki boşluktan yardım getirmek için gemi gemilere bindi."
languages.original_text: "When darkness fell upon our world and Nolla, the Emperor's Fiery Messenger, fled her celestial palace, almost all venerable clans boarded ark ships to bring help from the void between the stars."
